name: vapi-w3bstream-applets
description: VAPI W3bstream AssemblyScript applets — compiled to WASM via asc. Phase O4-W3B-POSEIDON-AS build pipeline (P.1).

scripts.asbuild:validate-poac: asc validate_poac_record.ts --config asconfig.json --target release --outFile dist/validate_poac_record.wasm --textFile dist/validate_poac_record.wat
scripts.asbuild:validate-zksep: asc validate_zk_sepproof.ts --config asconfig.json --target release --outFile dist/validate_zk_sepproof.wasm --textFile dist/validate_zk_sepproof.wat
scripts.asbuild:gsr: asc process_gsr_packet.ts --config asconfig.json --target release --outFile dist/process_gsr_packet.wasm --textFile dist/process_gsr_packet.wat
scripts.asbuild: npm run asbuild:validate-poac && npm run asbuild:validate-zksep && npm run asbuild:gsr
